content.text:
Memory stage: NoteReconciler v1.
        Namespace: project:<0>

        Decide how candidate notes should update active note memory.

        Return JSON:
        {
          "operations": [
            {
              "action": "insert | noop | supersede | retract | update",
              "candidate_index": 0,
              "target_note_id": "existing-note-id-or-null",
              "patch": null,
              "links_to_create": [
                {
                  "to_note_id": "existing-note-id",
                  "link_type": "supports | contradicts | refines | related | supersedes | derived_from",
                  "link_weight": 1.0
                }
              ],
              "reason": "short explanation"
            }
          ]
        }

        Actions:
        - insert: candidate is new reusable context.
        - noop: candidate duplicates an existing active note or is lower value.
        - supersede: candidate is a better current version of target_note_id.
        - update: patch target_note_id without inserting a new note.
        - retract: target_note_id should no longer be active because TARGET_SOURCE retracts it.

        Rules:
        - Compare semantic meaning, not wording.
        - Do not keep duplicate notes just because titles differ.
        - Prefer updating or superseding an existing note when the candidate refines the same decision, rationale, plan, or procedure.
        - Insert when the candidate captures a distinct reusable semantic fragment.
        - Use noop for summary spam, weak paraphrases, or information already captured by an existing note.
        - Use links_to_create only for strong semantic relations between notes.
        - target_note_id must be one of Existing active notes below or null.
        - candidate_index is zero-based from Candidate notes below.
        - Return one operation per candidate unless TARGET_SOURCE only retracts or updates an existing note.
        - Return valid JSON only.

        TARGET_SOURCE:
        Document title: 02. Data Model
Document source: agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md
Document section: 02. Data Model / 3. Главные сущности / 3.9 `MemoryRun`
Document lines: 501-539

### 3.9 `MemoryRun`

Audit trail и debug слой.

Нужен, чтобы видеть:
- какой prompt сработал
- на какой модели
- что именно было retrieved
- какой budget был выделен
- какие ops были предложены
- какие ops реально применились
- где pipeline сломался

Рекомендуемые поля:
- `run_id`
- `namespace_id`
- `run_type: route | retrieve_update | canonicalize | construct_notes | reconcile_notes | extract_claims | reconcile_claims | update_profile | update_tasks | consolidate_notes | repair_memory | apply_retention | read_plan | compose_answer | compact`
- `trigger_mode: hot_path | background | manual | slow_path`
- `source_ids_json`
- `retrieved_item_ids_json`
- `retrieval_budget_json`
- `prompt_name`
- `prompt_version`
- `model_name`
- `input_hash`
- `output_json`
- `applied_ops_json`
- `repair_actions_json`
- `latency_ms`
- `token_input`
- `token_output`
- `status: success | failed | partial`
- `error_text`
- `created_at`

Инварианты:
- run log не должен исчезать silently
- `input_hash` полезен для идемпотентности и retry safety

        Candidate notes:
        [0] type=DOC_DIGEST title=MemoryRun as audit trail and debug layer summary=In `agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md`, `MemoryRun` is the audit trail and debug layer for the memory pipeline, recording which prompt and model ran, what was retrieved, what budget was allocated, which ops were proposed and applied, and where the pipeline broke. Recommended fields include identifiers, run/trigger type, source and retrieved item IDs, retrieval budget, prompt/model metadata, in...[truncated 108 chars] scope=Document section `02. Data Model / 3. Главные сущности / 3.9 `MemoryRun`` in `agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md`, defining the MemoryRun component role, deb...[truncated 47 chars] entities=entity:<0> keywords=MemoryRun,audit trail,debug layer,run_type,trigger_mode,input_hash,applied_ops_json,repair_actions_json tags=doc_digest,data_model,memory_pipeline,debugging evidence=Audit trail и debug слой.

        Existing active notes:
        id=hot-path:note:<0> type=DOC_DIGEST status=ACTIVE maturity=FRESH title=Source as immutable evidence layer summary=In `agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md`, `Source` is the raw knowledge record for chat turns, tool outputs, imported notes, and external records; it serves as the primary evidence layer for re-check and explainability. Its design invariants require that a source not be silently changed, `observed_at` be stored separately from ingestion time, `content_hash` support dedupe, and delete policy be e...[truncated 8 chars] scope=Document section `02. Data Model / 3. Главные сущности / 3.1 `Source`` in `agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md`, defining the Source component role, fields, a...[truncated 14 chars] keywords=Source,evidence layer,observed_at,content_hash,dedupe,delete policy,agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md tags=data_model,source,evidence,invariants useCount=0
id=hot-path:note:<1> type=DOC_DIGEST status=ACTIVE maturity=FRESH title=Note as intermediate semantic memory fragment summary=In `agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md`, `Note` is an intermediate semantic memory fragment for important, retrieval-useful context that should not yet be cemented as a hard fact; typical uses include design direction, decision rationale, evolving plans, hypotheses, lessons, doc digests, and contextual framing. scope=Document section `02. Data Model / 3. Главные сущности / 3.4 `Note`` in `agent_memory_handoff/02_data_model.md`, defining Note purpose and use cases. keywords=Note,semantic memory fragment,retrieval,design direction,decision rationale,hypotheses,doc digests tags=doc_digest,data_model,note useCount=0

responseFormat.description: Reconcile note candidates against active memory notes.
responseFormat.name: memory_note_reconciler

systemPrompts:
You are a concise assistant inside a Gromozeka memory e2e test.
Answer user questions directly.
Do not use tools.
If the question asks for only a short value, return only that value.
